case_title: STOTTER & COATS,A CO-PARTNERSHIP et al vs. CARLSTON, MARY CROWLEY et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $110.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF STOTTER & COATS,A CO-PARTNERSHIP STOTTER, LAWRENCE H. COATS, SUSAN S. AS TO DEFENDANT CARLSTON, MARY CROWLEY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STOTTER & COATS,A CO-PARTNERSHIP STOTTER, LAWRENCE H. COATS, SUSAN S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARLSTON, MARY CROWLEY $21,813.59 PRINCIPAL, $3,035.89 INTEREST, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,959.48
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STOTTER & COATS,A CO-PARTNERSHIP JUDGMENT OF MAR-17-1994 SET ASIDE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-23-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAY-23-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525. HEARING SET FOR JUN-22-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
